title: SilverSwap - Open App
meta_description: silverswap opens the swap app for wallet-based token exchanges; verify the GitHub Pages domain before connecting.
hero_h2: Open the token exchange app from the verified destination
hero_lead: silverswap is the app destination for opening a wallet-based token swap flow from the verified GitHub Pages domain.
what_is: SilverSwap is a swap app destination hosted at the provided official GitHub Pages URL, built to route users into a wallet-based exchange flow. For wallet safety basics, review ethereum.org wallets before connecting.

how.d: Use the official URL and confirm the browser shows silverswap-app.github.io before interacting.
Choose the wallet and network you intend to use, then read the connection prompt carefully.
Pick the token you want to send and the token you want to receive in the swap interface.
Check token amounts, network, address, and wallet request details before approving any transaction.

points.p: The page points visitors directly to the official app URL instead of sending them through a generic search result.
Users stay in control of approvals and signatures through their own wallet; network activity can be checked with tools such as Etherscan when using Ethereum.
The content focuses on opening the app, selecting assets, and verifying transaction details without unsupported claims about fees, APY, audits, or liquidity.

faq.a: silverswap is presented here as the branded destination for opening the SilverSwap token swap app at the official GitHub Pages URL.
The official app URL provided for this page is https://silverswap-app.github.io/; verify that domain before connecting a wallet.

faq.q: How do I use silverswap safely?
faq.a: Open the official domain, connect only the wallet you intend to use, inspect token amounts and approvals, and sign only after reviewing the wallet prompt.

faq.q: Does silverswap publish fees or APY here?
faq.a: No fee, APY, audit, liquidity, or performance claim is made on this landing page; rely on the live app and wallet transaction details for current execution data.
Open silverswap only from the official app URL and avoid lookalike domains, ads, or copied links from unverified sources.

footer_note: Not the official app; verify the domain before connecting a wallet. Educational content only, not financial advice.
